details.productUrlName: Forge Anew Extended Art Surge Foil

customAttributes.description:
When Forge Anew enters the battlefield, return target Equipment card from your graveyard to the battlefield.
As long as it's your turn, you may activate equip abilities any time you could cast an instant.
You may pay 0 rather than pay the equip cost of the first equip ability you activate during each of your turns.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 11/3/2023. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
